source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage / Dropped Object

actions_taken: Time Out for Safety (TOFS) called to investigate
Gantry crane returned to starboard setback area for inspection
BSEE conducted onsite inspection and investigation
New encoder pinion and shaft assembly installed
event.summary: On 27-FEB-2021 at 0420 hours, while operating the BOP gantry crane aboard the Transocean Deepwater Pontus, a 2-pound teflon encoder pinion and shaft assembly broke and fell 72 feet to the BOP transporter deck. The crane was traversing from starboard to port side without bearing weight. No injuries occurred due to Red Zone Management Policy restricting personnel access. Root cause was corrosion at connection points caused by water penetration through the top-mounted cable gland of the encoder assembly.
recommendations: Third-party company plans to issue a Product Bulletin with potential encoder assembly upgrade by end of August 2021
key_phrases: encoder pinion and shaft assembly parted
design flaw in cable gland placement

threats.name: Encoder assembly corrosion due to water penetration
Structural failure of encoder pinion and shaft assembly
Loss of secondary retention on encoder pinion

controls.name: Red Zone Management Policy
controls.barrier_role: Restricts personnel access to hazardous areas during crane operations
controls.lod_basis: Administrative control preventing exposure to dropped object hazard

supporting_text: No personnel were in the area due to restricted access under the Red Zone Management Policy

controls.name: Preventive Maintenance (PM) Inspection
controls.barrier_role: Third-party company performed annual PM inspection to detect equipment degradation
controls.lod_basis: Scheduled maintenance to identify and prevent equipment failures

supporting_text: a third-party company recently performed the annual Preventive Maintenance (PM) inspection on February 18, 2021, with no issues noted
The documentation indicated that a third-party company recently performed the annual Preventive Maintenance (PM) inspection on February 18, 2021, with no issues noted

controls.name: BOP Auxiliary Gantry Crane Operations Procedure
controls.barrier_role: Documented procedure for safe crane operation and risk assessment
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control to ensure safe operation and identify hazards

supporting_text: A Toolbox Talk and the procedure to move the BOP gantry crane was signed by all involved subsea crew members

The documentation provided were a BOP Auxiliary Gantry Crane Operations Procedure, Planning and Risk Assessment Prompt Card, and a Pre-Lift Checklist. All of these documents were reviewed and signed by all participating crew members before operations commenced

controls.name: Time Out for Safety (TOFS) Protocol
controls.barrier_role: Immediate stop and investigation when abnormal conditions detected
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control to halt operations and investigate anomalies

supporting_text: a loud 'pop' was heard and the operation was stopped
While operating the crane, a loud 'pop' was heard, and the subsea crew called a Time Out for Safety (TOFS) to investigate
The Subsea Supervisor proceeded to operate the gantry crane remotely from the LMRP deck level when he heard a strange noise and immediately stopped the movement of the crane to investigate

controls.name: Encoder Design - Cable Gland Placement
controls.barrier_role: Engineering design to prevent water ingress into encoder assembly
controls.lod_basis: Engineering control to prevent corrosion through water exclusion

supporting_text: The encoder's design allowed water to enter and cause corrosion over time. If the electric cable gland would have been on the side of the encoder, water may not have penetrated the encoder and corroded the connection points
Over time, the top cable gland allowed water to settle and penetrate the encoder causing corrosion

controls.name: Secondary Retention Device on Encoder Pinion
controls.barrier_role: Engineering safeguard to retain pinion if primary connection fails
controls.lod_basis: Secondary engineering control to prevent dropped object consequence

supporting_text: the pinion fell from the bottom of the encoder, which did not have a secondary retention device

controls.name: Pre-Lift Checklist
controls.barrier_role: Verification of equipment condition and operational readiness before crane movement
controls.lod_basis: Administrative control to verify equipment fitness for operation

supporting_text: Other documents provided were a BOP Auxiliary Gantry Crane Operations Procedure, Planning and Risk Assessment Prompt Card, and a Pre-Lift Checklist. All of these documents were reviewed and signed by all participating crew members before operations commenced

controls.name: Subsea Supervisor Inspection and Verification
controls.barrier_role: Visual inspection of rigging and travel path before crane operation
controls.lod_basis: Human-based verification control to identify hazards before operation

supporting_text: The Subsea Supervisor ensured that the proper rigging was in place and the travel path was clear of obstructions

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
